# Phase 5: Heatmap Visualizations Verification Report

**Phase Goal:** Every clip detail page displays team positional heatmaps (PNG images generated by the pipeline) in a two-column layout with team-colored headings, responsive design, and an AI disclaimer.
**Verified:** 2026-03-19T20:10:00Z
**Status:** passed
**Re-verification:** No — initial verification

## Goal Achievement

### Observable Truths

| #  | Truth                                                                                                  | Status     | Evidence                                                                                                      |
|----|--------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 1  | Every clip detail page shows a 'Team Heatmaps' section with two PNG images rendered from manifest URLs | VERIFIED   | `[slug].astro` line 52: `<section class="heatmaps-section">` with two `<img>` tags bound to manifest fields  |
| 2  | Team 1 heatmap on the left with #0071e3 heading, Team 2 on the right with #e8732a heading             | VERIFIED   | Lines 152/156 in CSS: `.team1-label { color: #0071e3; }` and `.team2-label { color: #e8732a; }`              |
| 3  | Heatmap images do not 404 — BASE_URL prefix applied correctly for GitHub Pages subpath                 | VERIFIED   | Lines 59/68: `${base}${clip.heatmap_team1_url.replace(/^\//, '')}` — built output shows `/Korner-Flags_stats/data/08fd33_4_heatmap_team1.png` |
| 4  | At viewport width ≤640px the two-column grid collapses to a single column                             | VERIFIED   | Lines 139-143: `@media (max-width: 640px) { .heatmaps-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }`               |
| 5  | AI disclaimer "AI-estimated from video — values are approximate" appears below the heatmaps           | VERIFIED   | Line 75: `<p class="disclaimer-text">AI-estimated from video — values are approximate</p>`                   |

**Score:** 5/5 truths verified

### Build Verification

Built HTML for clip page confirms correct rendered `src` attributes:

- `/Korner-Flags_stats/data/08fd33_4_heatmap_team2.png`

### Human Verification Required

#### 1. Visual layout — two-column side-by-side render

**Test:** Open the deployed GitHub Pages site (or `astro preview`) and navigate to the clip detail page.
**Expected:** Two heatmap images render side-by-side on desktop. Team 1 label is blue, Team 2 label is orange. Images are not broken/missing.
**Why human:** Image file validity (non-corrupt PNG content) and actual visual spacing/proportion cannot be verified programmatically.

#### 2. Responsive collapse at 640px

**Test:** Open clip detail page in DevTools, set viewport to 639px width.
**Expected:** Two heatmap columns collapse to a single centered column.
**Why human:** CSS grid collapse is declared correctly in source, but actual render in a browser viewport must be visually confirmed.

## Gaps Summary

No gaps. All five observable truths are fully verified against the source file and the built output. The BASE_URL wiring is confirmed correct in the compiled HTML. Requirement SITE-05 is satisfied. The build is clean.
